nasb.text: but coming to Jesus, when they saw that He was already dead, they did not break His legs.

esv.text: But when they came to Jesus and saw that he was already dead, they did not break his legs.

cnv.text: 他們來到耶穌那裡，看見他已經死了，就沒有打斷他的腿。

ccb.text: 但是他们来到耶稣那里时，发现祂已经死了，就没有打断祂的腿，

csbs.text: 可是，当他们来到耶稣那里，看见他已经死了，就没有打断他的腿。
